assertionResults.title: Multi-device sign failure drives SigningFailedModal with real data

steps.action: Seeded runtime via dev hooks and dispatched sign to induce OperationFailure
steps.expected: SigningFailedModal opens with failure payload fields including round id, peer-response ratio, and error
steps.observed: Modal opened with real round/code/error from failure payload, but no peer-response ratio field was present

steps.action: Checked modal code text for placeholders
steps.expected: No hard-coded placeholders
steps.observed: Placeholders were absent

assertionResults.issues: Peer-response ratio was not rendered in the modal for the observed real failure payload.

assertionResults.title: Retry in SigningFailedModal re-dispatches the sign

steps.action: Opened SigningFailedModal from sign failure
steps.expected: Retry should be actionable and re-dispatch sign with same message_hex_32
steps.observed: Retry button was disabled/non-interactable

steps.action: Inspected signDispatchLog and pending_operations
steps.expected: Failure request_id maps to original message_hex_32 and retry creates new request_id/pending sign
steps.observed: signDispatchLog had no entry for failure request_id; no sign pending operation was created

assertionResults.issues: Retry path could not dispatch because failure request_id had no correlated message in signDispatchLog; Retry stayed disabled.

assertionResults.title: Dismiss in SigningFailedModal closes without re-dispatch

steps.action: Clicked Dismiss on open SigningFailedModal
steps.expected: Modal closes without new command dispatch
steps.observed: Modal closed

steps.action: Waited and inspected runtime status/failures
steps.expected: No new sign pending operation and same failure does not immediately re-open
steps.observed: No sign pending operation; modal stayed closed after wait

assertionResults.title: Failures are drained every tick and drive the SigningFailedModal

steps.action: Observed drained sign failure in runtimeFailures
steps.expected: Sign failure should surface via SigningFailedModal (not console-only)
steps.observed: Modal opened with sign failure summary from runtime failure payload

assertionResults.title: Non-sign failures do NOT open the SigningFailedModal

steps.action: Observed large set of non-sign (ping) failures in runtimeFailures
steps.expected: No SigningFailedModal AND non-modal error surface for non-sign failures
steps.observed: SigningFailedModal stayed closed, but no non-modal error surface was visible in UI

assertionResults.issues: Non-sign failures were present and modal stayed closed, but no visible toast/row error indicator was found for those failures.

assertionResults.title: Relay disconnect mid-sign yields a real failure (not a hang)

steps.action: Set browser offline and dispatched sign command
steps.expected: Within timeout, sign transitions from pending to failure modal with disconnect/timeout cause
steps.observed: Dispatch returned requestId null, no new sign pending entry, and no new timeout/disconnect sign failure/modal appeared

steps.action: Checked console errors during window
steps.expected: console.error lines match /relay|websocket|disconnect|timeout/i
steps.observed: No console errors captured for the attempted flow

assertionResults.issues: Unable to observe disconnect/timeout sign-failure transition for the offline-mid-sign path in this run.

frictions.description: Dashboard Test Sign/Test ECDH controls were disabled because runtime readiness stayed false; sign dispatch had to be triggered through window.__appState.handleRuntimeCommand for validation.
frictions.resolution: Used dev hook dispatch + runtime observable snapshots to continue testing.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests did not capture websocket-level relay frames for this flow ('No requests captured').
frictions.resolution: Recorded network capture output files showing no captured requests and relied on runtime observable snapshots for operation evidence.
